mapGuide.intent: Progressive map: use higher levels for layout and hot spots, drill into lower levels for exact lines and file size.

zoomLevels.contains: Sorted list of paths under src/
Per TS/TSX module: exported names/kinds, count of incoming references, unique imports of other TS/TSX files in src/
Every import/export-from/dynamic import with from-file, line, specifier
Full repo tree with line/byte counts (codemap/ excluded from tree)
